overview.value: English Ivy is a trailing vine with lobed leaves. Indoors it prefers cool rooms, bright filtered light, and evenly moist soil.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"English Ivy","overview":"English Ivy is a trailing vine with lobed leaves. Indoors it prefers cool rooms, bright filtered light, and evenly moist soil.","tips":"Trim vines regularly for a denser, less tangled plant."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"常春藤","overview":"常春藤是一种带裂叶的垂蔓植物。室内养护时，它更喜欢凉爽房间、明亮散射光和均匀微湿的土壤。","tips":"定期修剪藤蔓，可以让株型更浓密，也不容易打结。"}}
